attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.MESSAGE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ORGANIZATION_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.PID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.IMPROVED_TANS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CURRENT_SSD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.RECOMMENDED_SSD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CURRENT_SAD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.NEW_SAD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CURRENT_PDATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.SUGGESTED_PDATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.RECOMMIT_REASON, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.PULL_IN_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.PULL_IN_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.AMP_USER_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.TRANSMISSION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.OLD_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.NEW_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.TRANS_DATE_FISCAL_WEEK, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.SHIP_SET_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.SECONDARY_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.SS_DAYS_IMPROVED, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.RECOMMIT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT,
  (
 select MESSAGE_ID ,ORDER_NUMBER ,LINE_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT
 minus
 select MESSAGE_ID ,ORDER_NUMBER ,LINE_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RECOMMIT_DATA
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.MESSAGE_ID and ACM.ORDER_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.ORDER_NUMBER and ACM.LINE_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.LINE_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RCMMT_DT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RECOMMIT_DATA)
